Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean.content:
import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

/-!
# SVRG Outer-Loop Convergence Proofs

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on Layer 1 meta-theorems)

This file formalizes the outer-loop convergence of SVRG with random snapshot updates.
Unlike the inner loop (which reduces to plain SGD via snapshot freeze), the outer loop
requires explicit epoch telescoping because the snapshot updates every `m` steps.

Archetype: B — novel update structure (epoch-wise snapshot refresh)
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch parameters.

The snapshot updates every `m` steps (inner loop length), and the outer loop
runs for `K` epochs. Measurability and smoothness of `gradF` are structure fields
per Convention 2.

Used in: SVRG outer-loop convergence (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main setup) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω]
    (L : NNReal) (μ : ℝ) where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ  -- epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
  K : ℕ  -- number of outer epochs
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF
  hgradF_lsmooth : IsLSmooth toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L
  hgradF_strongly_convex : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ (toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]
variable {L : NNReal} {μ : ℝ}
variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω L μ)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: recursive epoch iteration.

Update rule: w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m
where w_k is the endpoint of epoch k (snapshot for epoch k+1).

Used in: SVRG outer-loop convergence (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main recursion) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      let w_k := setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k) setup.m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem process_zero : setup.svrgOuterProcess 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem process_succ (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) setup.m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability and Adaptedness
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of each outer-loop iterate.

Used in: SVRG outer-loop (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch_contraction_lemma — measurability) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (k : ℕ) : Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess k) := by
  sorry

/-- Adaptedness of SVRG outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: SVRG outer-loop (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted : Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) setup.svrgOuterProcess := by
  sorry

/-- Independence of `svrgOuterProcess k` from samples in epoch k.

Used in: SVRG outer-loop (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch_contraction_lemma — independence) -/
lemma svrgOuterProcess_indepFun_xi_epoch (k : ℕ) :
    IndepFun (setup.svrgOuterProcess k) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P := by
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- One-step contraction bound for a single epoch.

For epoch k → k+1:
  E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] ≤ (1 − ημ)^m · E[‖w_k − w*‖²] + η·σ_eff²/μ

Used in: SVRG outer-loop (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex — Step 2 telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (k : ℕ) (hk : k < setup.K)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω => ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω - wStar, setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω => ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω - wStar, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ setup.m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σeff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence under strong convexity.

Telescoping epoch contraction over K epochs:
  E[‖w_K − w*‖²] ≤ (1 − ημ)^(m·K) · ‖w₀ − w*‖² + σ_eff² / (m·μ²)

Used in: SVRG outer-loop convergence (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.sampleDist σ)
    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) setup.m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω => ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω - wStar, setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω => ⟪setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω - wStar, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ k t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess k ω)) t ω) (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess setup.K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (setup.m * setup.K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + σeff ^ 2 / (setup.m * μ ^ 2) := by
  sorry

end SVRGOuterSetup
